signals.raw:
Raptors down 2-0 to Cavaliers after Game 2 loss; Ja'Kobe Walter questionable for Game 3 due to illness | NO | HIGH confidence** [3][6]

The Cavaliers beat the Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, with Donovan Mitchell scoring 30 points and James Harden adding 28, extending their series lead to 2-0 ahead of Game 3 in Toronto [3][6]. Raptors coach Darko Rajakovic confirmed Jakob Poeltl will play a "big part"
